name: Eye of Fear
why: A powerful Epic relic that applies Fear to disrupt enemy formations. Particularly effective for League teams, while offering less value for Horde since several Horde heroes already inflict Fear.
description: Unleashes Abyssal Curse, inflicting Fear on enemies and disrupting their actions. Its crowd control makes it one of the strongest Epic relics for League teams and a reliable option until top-tier Legendary relics become available.
